title: Off-Policy Methods & Tooling
learningObjectives: Explain how DDPG uses a replay buffer and target networks to stably learn Q-functions off-policy for continuous action spaces.
Describe TD3's three tricks (clipped double-Q, delayed updates, target policy smoothing) and how each addresses DDPG's failure modes.
Derive SAC's entropy-regularized objective and explain how the reparameterization trick enables differentiable policy optimization.
Compare TD3 and SAC: when stochastic (SAC) vs deterministic (TD3) policies are preferable.
Use spinup.run and ExperimentGrid to launch, log, and compare experiments across hyperparameter grids.
Load a saved policy with test_policy and interpret progress.txt columns to diagnose training problems.
